case_title: STOLOWITZ, MARLENE et al vs. BRUSH CREEK MEDIA, INC. A CALIF. CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BRUSH CREEK MEDIA, INC. A CALIF. CORP.
